prose.en: When transferring information between different security domains, decompose information into {param:ac-04.13_odp} for submission to policy enforcement mechanisms.

guidance.en: Decomposing information into policy-relevant subcomponents prior to information transfer facilitates policy decisions on source, destination, certificates, classification, attachments, and other security- or privacy-related component differentiators. Policy enforcement mechanisms apply filtering, inspection, and/or sanitization rules to the policy-relevant subcomponents of information to facilitate flow enforcement prior to transferring such information to different security domains.

prose.en: when transferring information between different security domains, information is decomposed into {param:ac-04.13_odp} for submission to policy enforcement mechanisms.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing information flow enforcement policy

guidelines.en: policy-relevant subcomponents into which to decompose information for submission to policy enforcement mechanisms are defined;
